description: Ketubba fragment. Location: Fustat. Dated: 2 October 1039 CE. Groom: Faraḥ b. Raḥmūn. Bride: Sittūna bt. Naḥum, a virgin. Marriage payments: 10 + 20 = 30. Dowry = 110. Total = 140. (The total marriage gift of the husband is 30 dinars of which 10 were to be given immediately and 20 were delayed. The grand total is 140, of which the dowry is 110.) Unsigned. (Information from Mediterranean Society, I, 46; III, 378.)
description_he: קטע כתובה. מיקום: פוסטאט. מתוארך: 2 באוקטובר 1039 לספה. חתן: פרח ב' רחמון. כלה: סיטונה בת נחום, בתולה. תשלומי נישואין: 10+20=30. נדוניה = 110. סה"כ = 140.
